case_title: YUK YEE CHENG VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT RANDALL DEA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHENG, YUK YEE SERVED DEC-05-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JUL-15-2013. THE JUN-18-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ASSIGNMENT TO ARBITRATION OF JUL-29-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHENG, YUK YEE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RANDALL DEA SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-01-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-28-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-16-2013
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 4.0 DAYS

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-18-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S) RANDALL DEA. THE MAY-01-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR CHRIS ARTHUR TARKINGTON APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JUL-29-2013 THROUGH OCT-27-2013.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE JUL-25-2013.
